Note.title: Note
Note.description: Represents a user's task or reminder note.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

content.description: The detailed description or body of the note.

priority.description: The priority level of the note.

date.description: The scheduled date for the note (YYYY-MM-DD).

tags.description: List of tags associated with the note.

whatsappStatus.description: Status of the WhatsApp notification sync.

whatsappLastSent.description: Timestamp when high-priority note was successfully sent.

createdAt.description: ISO Timestamp when the note was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO Timestamp when the note was updated.

WhatsAppConfig.title: WhatsAppConfig
WhatsAppConfig.description: WhatsApp credentials for the user's Virtual Assistant notification integration.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

phoneNumberId.description: WhatsApp Business API Phone Number ID.

recipientNumber.description: User's own phone number to receive messages (with country code).

notes/{noteId}.description: Durable storage for user notes and tasks.

whatsappConfigs/{configId}.description: Configurations for user-specific WhatsApp notification endpoints.
